claims.evidence_text: AAPL reported 4Q17 revenues of $52.6b
4Q17 YoverY revenue growth = 12%
net income of $10.7b
$2.07 per diluted share
29.1m shares
Expects 1Q18 revenue to be $84-87b
Revenue $52.6b.
Up 12% YoverY.
Record EPS, $2.07.
Up 24% YoverY.
Revenue reached an all-time quarterly record of $8.5b in Sept. qtr.
Well on way to meeting that goal.
highest annual Mac revenue in Co. history
25% Mac revenue growth
highest annual Mac revenue in Co. history
highest annual Mac revenue in Co. history
highest annual Mac revenue in Co. history
75% YoverY in 4Q
annual revenue of a Fortune 400 co.
revenue $52.6b; record.
Up 12% YoverY.
Revenue growth in all product categories for second qtr. in a row.
Revenue up 12% YoverY.
With momentum in India, revenue doubled YoverY.
Grew more than 30% in Mexico, Middle East, Turkey and Central and Eastern Europe.
Aforementioned results helped to fuel overall growth of over 20% from emerging markets.
GM 37.9%, at high-end of guidance range.
Operating margin, 25% of revenue.
Net income $10.7b.
Diluted EPS $2.07; new Sept. qtr. record.
Up 24% YoverY.
Cash flow from operations $15.7b; strong.
Sold 46.7m, up 3% YoverY.
Saw double-digit iPhone growth in many emerging markets including mainland China, Middle East, Central and Europe, India and Mexico.
Gained shares also in Canada, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Sweden and Singapore based on latest estimates from IDC.
Customer satisfaction rating of 97% or higher across all iPhone models.
Purchase intension for iPhone was 69%, more than five times rate of closest competitor with a loyalty rate for current iPhone owners of 95% vs. 53% for next highest brand.

For corporate smartphone buyers, iOS customer satisfaction was 95% and of those planning to purchase smartphones in Dec. qtr., 80% plan to purchase iPhone; highest score for iPhone in history of survey.
Set all-time quarterly record of $8.5b, up 34% YoverY.
Results included favorable one-time revenue adjustment of $640m.
On run-rate basis, excluding adjustments, services growth of 24% was terrific and highest that Co. has experienced this year.
App Store set a new all-time record.
